title: Capability Manifest overclaims agent/runtime readiness
targetInvariant: Capability manifests describe supported surfaces and must not become self-certified runtime-readiness claims.
attackPattern: A deployment advertises two-agent compatibility, world-model support, or runtime conformance without executed evidence.
attemptedShortcut: Treating manifest content as conformance evidence.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

farmerValueProtected: Prevents farmers and buyers from being misled by aspirational manifest declarations.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
